title: astragalus bellus
intro: Astragalus bellus, also known as the Mongolian milkvetch, is a plant species belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries to treat various health conditions, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus bellus include reducing stress and fatigue, improving immune function, and preventing infections, making it a popular herb among athletes and individuals with compromised immune systems. Astragalus bellus can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
